Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-20 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two starkly different momentum profiles at the top of the rankings. TYRA (rank #1, score 97.6) demonstrates textbook consistent momentum with perfect SMA alignment across all timeframes, a 1-year return of 246% paired with smooth ratio progression (ranging from 2.85 to 5.65x), and notably strong resilience during SPY downdays (0.5996 score indicates minimal drawdown correlation). In sharp contrast, TNGX (rank #2) shows extreme but volatile returns—a 1-year gain of 1,009%—yet flags significant inconsistency: a negative 1-day return of -0.7% creating a red-flag ratio of -15.59, only 4 of 5 ratio passes versus TYRA's perfect 5, and concerning low resilience (0.1392 bad_spy_score suggests heavy SPY downday losses). While both pass all SMA thresholds and outpace SPY/QQQ substantially, TYRA's score of 97.6 reflects stable, repeatable momentum patterns, whereas TNGX's explosive returns carry execution risk and correlation fragility that the ranking system penalizes through lower composite scoring.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
